concerns.text: Task T014c adds a stimulus validation heuristic requiring >0 faces or office elements, which is not specified in the spec and narrows the definition of acceptable stimuli, weakening FR‑001 and SC‑001.

Task T032c filters fetched clips to require face presence or office elements, introducing a constraint not present in the specification and retroactively narrowing the stimulus set, violating the spec’s FR‑001.
FR‑003 requires controlling for task difficulty, but the task list provides no task to capture or define a task‑difficulty variable, dropping an acceptance criterion.

SC‑002 mandates reporting a p‑value for the correlation between visual complexity and NASA‑TLX scores, yet no task computes this correlation; the analysis tasks only run mixed‑effects models, leaving the success criterion unimplemented.
